enabled.description: Enable it for pipelines deployed in the server

bucketName.description: S3 bucket name for storing logs (required for S3 type)

prefix.description: S3 key prefix for organizing logs

enableServerSideEncryption.description: Enable server-side encryption for S3 objects

kmsKeyId.description: KMS Key ID for server-side encryption (if applicable)

storageClass.description: S3 storage class for log objects

expirationDays.description: Number of days after which logs are automatically deleted (0 means no expiration)

maxConcurrentStreams.description: Maximum number of concurrent log streams allowed

streamTimeoutMinutes.description: Timeout in minutes for idle log streams before automatic cleanup (DEPRECATED: use streamTimeoutHours)

streamTimeoutHours.description: Idle threshold in hours before the abandoned-run sweeper finalizes a stream. Replaces streamTimeoutMinutes for new deployments.

cleanupIntervalMinutes.description: How often (in minutes) the abandoned-run sweeper wakes up to check for expired streams.

partialFlushIntervalMinutes.description: Periodic cadence (in minutes) for flushing in-memory pendingFlush queue to partial.txt.

earlyFlushWatermarkBytes.description: Triggers an out-of-band flush when pendingFlush exceeds this size in bytes (default 5 MB).

pendingFlushAlertAfterFailures.description: Emit an alerting metric after this many consecutive failed flushes for a single stream.

asyncBufferSizeMB.description: Size of async buffer in MB for batching log writes
